The '''Eternal Pyre''' was a vast pyre constructed within a natural depression just east of the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].

==Overview==
Constructed near to the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] by the [[Sith Empire (Pre-Republic)|Sith Empire]], the Eternal pyre was located in a natural depression which housed several altars and minor temples. Smoke from the pyre rose constantly from the burning heap and its fires constantly stoked by the bodies of dead [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]].<ref name="TEGPM" />

Following the arrival of the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Exiles]], [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Sorzus Syn]] led an expedition across the planet to sites of interest to learn what she could of [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith culture]]. At the pyre she discovered the [[Mongrel Altar]] hidden behind a mural of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Adas]]; within the altar was concealed a set of cursed scrolls and the headless corpse of [[Wyrmuk the Undying]].<ref name="BOS" />
